arts.sum: Chelsea face Fulham for the 35th time in the Premier League era on Saturday for their third London derby in the month of December. Enzo Maresca, whose side are still chasing an unlikely title this season, is without seven players for the visit of their local rivals. arts.ttl: Arsenal and Chelsea ‘join the hunt’ for Belgian player – PL duo could be set for transfer battle
arts.sum: KRC Genk’s Konstantinos Karetsas has been included in Arsenal and Chelsea’s target list, according to Sport 24. Genk initially signed the 17-year-old for their academy in 2023 and promoted him to their first team earlier this year. arts.ttl: Full Chelsea squad available vs Fulham as Romeo Lavia decision made
arts.sum: Chelsea go into the game with several injury concerns, which Maresca addressed in his pre-match press conference on Christmas Eve. Romeo Lavia suffered a hamstring injury earlier this month, and Maresca confirmed that, even though the midfielder is progressing with his fitness, a return against Fulham is not on the cards. Here, football.london takes a look at the likely Chelsea squad to face Fulham in the Premier League, barring any late injury or fitness issues.
